mapper.insert: insert into report_base_${tableName} (id, ${tableName}_name, create_time, is_delete, audit_state, user_id) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{spotName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sysdate(), 0, 0, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.select:
select type_code from merchant_type where type_name in
#{role}
select id,audit_state as auditState, ${tableName}_name as baseName from report_base_${tableName} where user_id = ${userId} and is_delete = 0
